# Pull Request

## 📝 Description

Describe the changes in this PR in 2-3 sentences.  
What does it add, change, or fix? Why is it needed?

## 🔗 Related issue

Link any related issue (e.g. `Closes #42`) or write "N/A" if this is a standalone change.

## ✅ Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing behaviour to change)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🧹 Code refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] 🧪 Test-only change

## 🧪 Testing

Describe the tests you ran to verify your changes.

- [ ] Unit tests pass locally (`make test-unit`)
- [ ] Integration tests pass locally (`make test-int`)
- [ ] Pipeline runs end-to-end without errors (`make run`)
- [ ] Added new tests that fail without this change and pass with it

## 📋 Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style (`make lint` passes)
- [ ] I have added every-line comments to any new source file
- [ ] I have updated `docs/` if this change affects pipeline behaviour or schema
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under the `[Unreleased]` section
- [ ] I have added or updated tests to cover the change
- [ ] All GitHub Actions checks pass on this branch

## 📸 Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots of new output, dashboards, or notebook cells if relevant.

## 💬 Additional context

Add any other context, design decisions, or trade-offs here.
